channel.title: FriendLikeMe on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in FriendLikeMe on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 1122789997168549888
item.description:
If I could have three wishes for my best friends, they’d be:

❤ A long, happy and healthy life 🌼🐝 A planet for all species 🤖🍞🎪 Fully automated luxury communism for all.

You ain’t never had a #friendLikeMe

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
